credentials.caCertificateDescription: Optional: Upload or paste the CA-signed certificate file (e.g. id_ed25519-cert.pub). Required when your SSH server uses certificate-based authorization.
credentials.noPublicKeyAvailable: No public key available. Open the credential editor first.

serverConfig.title: Server Configuration
serverConfig.description: Configure the Termix server URL to connect to your backend services
serverConfig.helpText: Enter the URL where your Termix server is running (e.g., http://localhost:30001 or https://your-server.com)
serverConfig.mustIncludeProtocol: Server URL must start with http:// or https://
serverConfig.allowInvalidCertificateDesc: A se utiliza numai pentru servere auto-găzduite de încredere, cu certificate autosemnate sau cu adresă IP.
serverConfig.embeddedDesc: Run Termix with the built-in local server (no remote server needed)
serverConfig.embeddedNotReady: Local server is not ready yet. Please wait a moment and try again.

versionCheck.newVersionAvailable: A new version is available! You are running {{current}}, but {{latest}} is available.
versionCheck.betaVersionDesc: You are running {{current}}, which is newer than the latest stable release {{latest}}.

hosts.metricsIntervalDesc: How often to collect server statistics (5s - 1h)
hosts.overrideCredentialUsernameDesc: Use the username specified above instead of the credential's username
hosts.oidcUsernameHint: Use $oidc.preferred_username to substitute your OIDC login name.
hosts.wolBroadcastAddressDesc: Optional directed broadcast for Docker/routed networks (e.g. 192.168.1.255). Leave empty to use 255.255.255.255.
hosts.pinToTopDesc: Always show this host at the top of the list
hosts.useSocks5ProxyDesc: Route connection through a proxy server
hosts.keyReplaceNotice: paste a new key below to replace it
hosts.opksshDesc: Sign in to this host using your identity provider instead of a password or key. Requires OPKSSH set up on the server.
hosts.warpgateDesc: This host connects through a Warpgate SSH proxy. Termix will handle the browser-based approval flow automatically after authenticating.
hosts.tailscaleNoApiKey: No Tailscale API key configured. Add one in Admin Settings to enable device discovery.
hosts.tailscaleNoDevices: No devices found in your tailnet.
hosts.tailscaleDeviceAutoFill: Selecting a device will auto-fill the host IP address.
hosts.forceKeyboardInteractiveShortDesc: Force manual password entry even if keys are present
hosts.allowLegacyAlgorithmsDesc: Enable deprecated SSH algorithms (ssh-dss, ssh-rsa, diffie-hellman-group1-sha1, hmac-md5, 3des-cbc) for connections to old devices that cannot be upgraded.
hosts.cursorBlinkingDesc: Enable blinking animation for the terminal cursor
hosts.rightClickSelectsWordShortDesc: Select the word under cursor on right-click
hosts.backgroundImageDesc: Optional URL for a terminal background image
hosts.syntaxHighlightingDesc: Colorize terminal output (errors, paths, IPs, timestamps)
hosts.syntaxHighlightingCategoriesDesc: Choose which types of content to colorize
hosts.scrollbackMaxLines: Maximum number of lines kept in history
hosts.sshAgentForwardingShortDesc: Pass your local SSH keys to this host
hosts.useSSHTitleDesc: Update the tab title from the shell's window title instead of the host name
hosts.enableAutoMoshDesc: Prefer Mosh over SSH if available
hosts.enableAutoTmuxDesc: Automatically launch or attach to tmux session
hosts.enableSessionLoggingDesc: Record terminal session output for later review
hosts.enableCommandHistoryDesc: Record commands run in this terminal for history and autocomplete
hosts.linkClickBehaviorDesc: Controls what happens when you click a link in the terminal. Use 'Default' to follow the app-level setting.
hosts.linkClickBehaviorConfirm: Show popup to open or copy
hosts.sudoPasswordAutoFillShortDesc: Automatically provide sudo password when prompted
hosts.sudoPasswordAutoFillDesc: Store a sudo password so host metrics, terminal prompts, and others can run privileged commands automatically.
hosts.enableTunnelingDesc: Enable SSH tunnel functionality for this host
hosts.tunnelModeLocalDesc: Forward a local port to a port on the remote server (or a host reachable from it).
hosts.tunnelModeRemoteDesc: Forward a port on the remote server back to a local port on your machine.
hosts.tunnelModeDynamicDesc: Create a SOCKS5 proxy on a local port for dynamic port forwarding.
hosts.autoStartDesc: Automatically connect this tunnel when the host is loaded
hosts.enableDockerMonitorDesc: Monitor and manage containers on this host via Docker
hosts.enableTmuxMonitorDesc: Show this host in the Tmux Monitor and add its tmux actions to the sidebar
hosts.enableProxmoxDesc: Mark this host as a Proxmox node. Enables guest discovery and import directly from this host.
hosts.proxmoxDefaultAuthTypeDesc: Authentication method applied to imported guest hosts. Choose the auth type that matches how you connect to your guests.
hosts.proxmoxDefaultCredentialDesc: Credential used for imported guest hosts when auth type is set to Credential.
hosts.proxmoxWindowsDetectionDesc: Comma-separated name patterns that trigger RDP instead of SSH (case-insensitive)
hosts.proxmoxDockerDetectionDesc: Comma-separated name patterns that enable Docker for matching guests
hosts.proxmoxPreferredRangesDesc: Comma-separated prefixes in priority order for IP selection when a guest has multiple interfaces
hosts.proxmoxNoGuests: No guests found on this Proxmox node.
hosts.enableFileManagerMonitorDesc: Browse and manage files on this host over SFTP
hosts.scpLegacyDesc: Use legacy file transfer for servers that do not support the SFTP subsystem (e.g. embedded or minimal SSH servers).
hosts.fileManagerPathHint: The directory to open when the file manager launches for this host.
hosts.enableStatusChecksDesc: Periodically ping this host to verify availability
hosts.useGlobalIntervalDesc: Override with the server-wide status check interval
hosts.enableMetricsDesc: Collect CPU, RAM, disk, and network usage from this host
hosts.useGlobalMetricsDesc: Override with the server-wide metrics interval
hosts.widgetsMovedToHostMetrics: Cards are now added, arranged, and resized directly in the Host Metrics tab. Open Host Metrics for this host and use Customize to choose which cards are shown.
hosts.cpuUsageDesc: CPU percent, load averages, sparkline graph
hosts.listeningPortsDesc: Open ports with process and state
hosts.quickActionsToolbar: Quick actions appear as buttons in the Host Metrics toolbar for one-click command execution.
hosts.credentialNameRequired: Please enter a name for the credential
hosts.addFirstHost: Add your first host to get started
hosts.deleteAllInFolder: Delete all hosts in "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
hosts.folderDialogDescription: Choose a name, color, and icon. Use / to nest folders.
hosts.folderNestingHint: Use / to separate levels and create nested folders.
hosts.deleteFolderConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" and its {{count}} host(s)? This cannot be undone.
hosts.wakeOnLanError: Nu s-a putut trimite pachetul magic
hosts.deleteHostsConfirm: Delete {{count}} host{{plural}}? This cannot be undone.
hosts.generateKeyPairDesc: Generate a new key pair, both private and public keys will be filled automatically.
hosts.tunnelRequirementsText: The SSH server must have GatewayPorts yes, AllowTcpForwarding yes, and PermitRootLogin yes set in /etc/ssh/sshd_config.
hosts.enableAtLeastOneProtocol: Enable at least one protocol above to configure authentication and connection settings.
hosts.generateKeyPairDescription: Generate a new key pair, both private and public keys will be filled automatically.

sharing.requiresCredential: This host must use a credential to enable sharing. Edit the host and assign a credential first.

guac.loadBalanceInfoDesc: RD Connection Broker cookie for RDS farm load balancing (e.g. tsv://MS Terminal Services Plugin.1.CollectionName)
guac.guacdProxyDesc: Override the global guacd instance for this connection. Leave blank to use the globally configured guacd.
guac.ignoreCertificateDesc: Allow connections to hosts with self-signed certificates
guac.forceLosslessDesc: Force lossless image encoding (higher quality, more bandwidth)
guac.disableAudioDesc: Mute all audio from the remote session
guac.enableAudioInputDesc: Forward local microphone to the remote session
guac.menuAnimationsDesc: Enable menu fade and slide animations
guac.disableBitmapCachingDesc: Turn off bitmap cache (may help with glitches)
guac.enablePrintingDesc: Redirect local printers to the remote session
guac.enableDriveRedirectionDesc: Map a local folder as a drive in the remote session
guac.createDrivePathDesc: Automatically create the folder if it does not exist
guac.disableDownloadDesc: Prevent downloading files from the remote session
guac.disableUploadDesc: Prevent uploading files to the remote session
guac.consoleSessionDesc: Connect to the console (session 0) instead of a new session
guac.sendWolPacketDesc: Send a magic packet to wake this host before connecting
guac.disableCopyDesc: Prevent copying text from the remote session
guac.disablePasteDesc: Prevent pasting text into the remote session
guac.excludeOutputDesc: Do not record screen output (metadata only)
guac.includeKeystrokesDesc: Record raw keystrokes in addition to screen output
guac.swapRedBlueDesc: Swap the red and blue color channels (fixes some colour issues)
guac.readOnlyDesc: View the remote screen without sending any input
guac.sharingOptionsAfterSave: Sharing options are available after the host has been saved.
guac.sharingLoadError: Failed to load sharing data. Check your connection and try again.

commandPalette.tmuxMonitorDesc: Monitor tmux sessions across your hosts

connections.noConnectionsDesc: Deschideți un terminal, un manager de fișiere sau un desktop la distanță pentru a vedea conexiunile aici
connections.backgroundDesc: Sesiunile persistă timp de 30 de minute după deconectare și pot fi reconectate.
connections.noSearchResults: Nicio conexiune nu corespunde căutării dvs.

guacamole.guacdUnavailable: Remote desktop service (guacd) is not available. Please ensure guacd is running and accessible and configured properly in admin settings.

terminal.tmuxUnavailable: tmux is not installed on the remote host, falling back to standard shell

transfer.noHostsConnected: Nu sunt disponibile alte gazde de gestionare a fișierelor.
transfer.noHostsConnectedHint: Adăugați o altă gazdă SSH cu File Manager activat în Host Manager.
transfer.destMustBeDirectory: Destinația trebuie să fie un director pentru transferurile cu mai multe elemente
transfer.browsePathWillBeCreated: Acest folder nu există încă. Va fi creat când va începe transferul.
transfer.browsePathError: Nu s-a putut deschide această cale pe gazda destinație.
transfer.hostAuthRequired: Autentificare necesară — deschideți mai întâi File Manager pe această gazdă
transfer.parallelSegmentsHint: Fișierele mari sunt împărțite în blocuri de 256 MB. Mai multe benzi utilizează conexiuni separate (cum ar fi pornirea mai multor transferuri) pentru un debit total mai mare.
transfer.jumpHostLimitation: Ambele gazde trebuie să fie accesibile de pe serverul Termix. Rutarea directă de la gazdă la gazdă nu este acceptată.
transfer.methodAutoHint: Alege SFTP tar sau per fișier în funcție de numărul de fișiere, dimensiune și compresibilitate. Fișierele individuale utilizează întotdeauna SFTP în flux continuu.
transfer.methodTarHint: Comprimare la sursă, transfer o arhivă, extragere la destinație. Necesită tar pe ambele gazde Unix.
transfer.methodItemSftpHint: Transferă fiecare fișier individual prin SFTP. Funcționează pe toate gazdele, inclusiv Windows.
transfer.methodPreviewError: Nu s-a putut previzualiza metoda de transfer. Serverul va alege în continuare o metodă când porniți.
transfer.methodPreviewWillUseItemSftp: Se va utiliza: SFTP per fișier
transfer.methodItemSftpLimitation: Fiecare fișier folosește același flux SFTP ca o copie a unui singur fișier, una după alta. Progresul este combinat în toate fișierele, astfel încât bara se mișcă lent în timpul fișierelor mari.

methodReason.tar_unavailable: Tar nu este disponibil pe una sau ambele gazde — se va folosi în schimb SFTP per fișier.
methodReason.windows_host: Este implicată o gazdă Windows — nu se folosește fișierul tar.
methodReason.auto_multi_large: Auto: multiple files including a large file ({{largestSize}}) with compressible data — tar bundles into one transfer.
methodReason.auto_single_large_in_archive: Auto: one large file ({{largestSize}}) in this set — per-file SFTP.
methodReason.auto_many_incompressible: Automat: date în mare parte incompresibile — SFTP per fișier.
methodReason.auto_many_files: Auto: many files ({{fileCount}}) — tar reduces per-file overhead.
methodReason.auto_default: Automat: SFTP per fișier pentru acest set.

transfer.resumedHint: Reconectare la un transfer activ început într-o altă fereastră.
transfer.transferCancelledCopyHint: Fișiere parțiale pot rămâne în destinație.
transfer.transferCancelledMoveHint: Fișiere parțiale pot rămâne în destinație. Fișierele sursă nu au fost eliminate.
transfer.cleanupDestFilesPartial: Unele fișiere parțiale nu au putut fi eliminate
transfer.transferFailedRetryHint: Date parțiale au fost păstrate la destinație. Reîncercarea va fi reluată după restabilirea conexiunii.

auth.authenticationDisabledDesc: All authentication methods are currently disabled. Please contact your administrator.
auth.passwordLoginDisabledDesc: Password login is disabled. Please use an external authentication provider below.

admin.sslDescription: Automatically issue and renew a trusted SSL certificate from Let's Encrypt. Requires a public domain and port 80 or DNS access.

userProfile.compactHostViewDesc: Collapse each host to a single line showing only its name and address
userProfile.statusColorsDesc: Use green/red for online/offline status instead of the accent color
userProfile.pinAppRailDesc: Mențineți șina aplicației din bara laterală stângă mereu extinsă, în loc să se extindă la trecerea cu mouse-ul peste mouse
userProfile.navigationTabsDesc: Choose which tabs appear in the app rail
userProfile.totpInstructions: Scan QR code or enter secret in your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code
userProfile.createApiKeyDescription: Generate a new API key for programmatic access.
userProfile.apiKeyPermissionsHint: Keys inherit the permissions of the creating user.
userProfile.totpDisableInputRequired: Enter your TOTP code or password
userProfile.passwordFieldsRequired: Current and new passwords are required
userProfile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
userProfile.deletePasswordRequired: Password is required to delete your account

tmuxMonitor.title: Tmux Monitor
tmuxMonitor.tmuxUnavailable: tmux is not installed on this host
tmuxMonitor.noSessions: No tmux sessions on this host
tmuxMonitor.selectPaneHint: Select a pane to preview its output
tmuxMonitor.resizeTree: Drag to resize — double-click to reset
tmuxMonitor.killWindowBody: Every pane and process in this window will be terminated. Killing the last window ends the session.
tmuxMonitor.killPaneBody: The process running in this pane will be terminated. Killing the last pane closes its window.
tmuxMonitor.killSessionBody: All windows and running processes in this session will be terminated. This cannot be undone.
tmuxMonitor.hostUnreachable: Could not connect to the host. Check that it is online and reachable.
tmuxMonitor.noServer: No tmux server is running on this host.
tmuxMonitor.searchTruncated: Partial results — search covers the last {{lines}} lines of each pane and at most {{panes}} panes.
tmuxMonitor.noHostsHint: Enable the Tmux Monitor option on an SSH host (Host Manager → Terminal tab) to monitor its tmux sessions.
tmuxMonitor.tmuxInstallHint: Install it on the host with:
tmuxMonitor.attachTooltipPane: Open a terminal to {{host}} — tmux session {{session}}

mobileKeyboard.quickKeysDesc: Tap × to remove. Supports up to 8 characters.
